page: OVHcloud r3-64 is a memory-optimized server instance powered by an AMD EPYC Milan processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 8 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, running at a base clock speed of 2.3 GHz. The system is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Local storage is provided by a bundled 200 GB NVMe SSD, and the instance includes a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps along with one complimentary public IPv4 address. The virtualization layer is managed via the KVM hypervisor.

Benchmark results indicate strong single-core performance, with stress-ng single-core CPU tests and Geekbench single-core scores placing in the top 25%. This single-threaded strength is also reflected in bzip3 decompression and text processing benchmarks, which both achieved strong ratings. Multi-core performance, including stress-ng multi-core and Geekbench multi-core metrics, falls within the average range. Memory performance is notable for its strong write bandwidth on large uncached blocks and a strong Passmark memory score, though read-only memory bandwidth remains average.

From a resource density perspective, the r3-64 offers a high memory-to-vCPU ratio, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for workloads that require substantial memory capacity without needing massive parallel compute scaling. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance, though the single thread per core configuration limits concurrent execution compared to hyperthreaded alternatives. This hardware profile is suited for memory-intensive applications, database operations, caching layers, and text processing tasks.
description: OVHcloud r3-64 is a memory-optimized server instance featuring 8 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, operating at 2.3 GHz. It is configured with 64.0 GB of RAM, yielding 8.0 GB per core, and includes a bundled 200 GB NVMe SSD alongside a 2 Gbps baseline network interface. Virtualized via KVM, the instance demonstrates strong single-core CPU and memory write performance, as evidenced by top 25% results in Geekbench single-core and Passmark memory benchmarks. Conversely, its multi-core compute capabilities align with mid-range averages. This resource profile makes the r3-64 a balanced option for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, and text processing tasks where high memory capacity per core is required without the overhead of hyperthreaded compute scaling.
og_description: OVHcloud r3-64 is a memory-optimized server featuring 8 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 64 GB RAM, and a 200 GB NVMe SSD, delivering strong single-core and memory write performance for database workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC cores, high memory-to-vCPU density, and fast local NVMe storage for database workloads.
